sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43390" key="eu)ana/mnhstos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐανά-μνηστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily remembering</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:8p.432M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8p.432M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
